Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Tracheophyta; Spermatophyta; Magnoliopsida; Liliopsida; Potamogetonaceae; Potamogeton
Assembly: The assembly laPotLuce1.hap1.1 is based on 84x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. This is a allotetraploid species. Two haplotypes are in hap1 fasta file and the other two are in hap2 fasta file.
